claims.quote: Whether you are just starting to think about working for Emory, have recently come onboard as a new hire, or have worked here for many years, a career with Emory is like no other. We are here to assist you in every stage of your career.
claims.claimText: Emory careers portal — general career page covering jobs across the institution.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Page is the Emory HR careers landing page describing job search and career-stage support — Tier 3 post-trainee career content.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Notice of Filing of Labor Condition Applications (Emory University) Notice of Filing of Labor Condition Applications (Emory + Children’s Pediatric Institute)
claims.claimText: Page links to Labor Condition Application notices — an H-1B sponsorship signal at Emory University and Emory + Children's Pediatric Institute.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Labor Condition Application filings are H-1B-related employer postings — Tier 3 visa-sponsorship signal for attendings/faculty.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote:
Your Benefits
Faculty, Staff & Post Docs
Medical House Staff
Retirees
Emory Clinic Physicians
claims.claimText: Benefits programs are organized for Faculty/Staff/Post Docs, Medical House Staff, Retirees, and Emory Clinic Physicians.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Benefits structure references attending/faculty (Emory Clinic Physicians) and house staff — primarily Tier 3 with Tier 2 overlap; tagging as Tier 3 per dominant career framing.
claims.limitations: Also references Medical House Staff (Tier 2) and Post Docs.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Continuing Medical EducationWe offer conferences, online and in-person training, mini-fellowships, and other programs for the continued development of health care professionals.
claims.claimText: CME offerings include conferences, training, mini-fellowships for health care professionals.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: CME serves practicing health care professionals — Tier 3.

claims.claimText: Faculty Recruitment navigation entry indicates faculty hiring presence.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Faculty recruitment is post-trainee attending/faculty hiring — Tier 3.
claims.limitations: Navigation label only; no detail on positions.

claims.quote: The Innovation Certificate Program is designed for clinicians to develop and enrich entrepreneurial skills and business knowledge for those interested in learning how to bring technologies to market.
claims.claimText: Innovation Certificate Program is a clinician-oriented entrepreneurship training program — faculty/professional development, not USCE.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Program targets clinicians for entrepreneurship/commercialization — a post-trainee faculty development offering, not pre-residency USCE or GME training.
claims.limitations: Med-school domain; program is a faculty development certificate, not a clinical experience.

claims.quote: Current faculty, PhD, post-doc or staff member of Emory School of Medicine or Emory Healthcare with an interest in innovation and entrepreneurship (no experience required) and a commitment to attending all 8 course session.
claims.claimText: Eligibility is restricted to current Emory faculty, PhD, post-doc, or staff — medical students are not listed as eligible.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Eligibility explicitly limited to current Emory faculty/PhD/post-doc/staff — a Tier 3 internal faculty/staff program with no USCE access path.
claims.limitations: Closed to external applicants and not directed at medical students.

claims.quote:
Your FSAP
About FSAP
Faculty, Staff & Family Members
Faculty Physicians
Medical House Staff (Residents and Fellows)
Leaders and Teams
Crisis Intervention Services
claims.claimText: Emory FSAP (Faculty Staff Assistance Program) lists dedicated tracks for Faculty Physicians and Medical House Staff (Residents and Fellows), including crisis intervention services.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: FSAP for Faculty Physicians is a Tier 3 attending-support service; Medical House Staff overlap noted but page primarily a career/HR services portal.
claims.limitations: Overlaps Tier 2 via Medical House Staff line.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured generic benefits categories but did not surface the FSAP physician/house-staff service tracks listed lower in the nav.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Search and Apply for Jobs Join our Talent Network View our FAQs View our Application Roadmap View Career Resources for Emory Alumni
claims.claimText: Careers portal exposes a Talent Network signup, an Application Roadmap, and Career Resources for Emory Alumni.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Talent network and alumni career resources are Tier 3 employment-pipeline tools targeting prospective/returning employees including physicians.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 surfaced only the generic welcome paragraph; the quick-links row with concrete job-pipeline tools was not captured.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote:
Your Career

Why Work at Emory

Talent Network

claims.claimText: Emory career nav includes Temporary Employment and a Summer College Internship Program in addition to standard job search and career-development resources.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Temporary employment is Tier 3 workforce content; the Summer College Internship Program is undergraduate (not medical-student USCE) so it remains in the careers/Tier 3 framing rather than Tier 1.
claims.limitations: Summer College Internship is undergrad-college, not medical student — not USCE-relevant.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 only quoted the welcome paragraph and did not enumerate the Career sub-nav items.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote:

claims.claimText: Work Life resources include Financial Programs, Workplace Flexibility, and Transitioning to Retirement — adult-life financial setup supports for Emory employees.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Financial / retirement / flexibility resources are Tier 3 attending-life support distinct from the medical/insurance benefits categories already captured.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured the Benefits group but not the separately listed Work Life group with financial / retirement / flexibility resources.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Faculty RecruitmentThe Department of Medicine is led by an extraordinary group of faculty who are experts in their fields.
claims.claimText: Emory DOM has a Faculty Recruitment section indicating active faculty hiring.
claims.limitations: No specific jobs, salary, or visa-sponsorship language on this page.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 focused on trainee programs and did not surface the faculty-recruitment / Tier 3 career signal.

claims.claimText: Emory DOM Office of Faculty Development includes a Career Development program.
claims.whyA1Missed: Sub-nav under Faculty Development not surfaced by A1.

claims.quote: Faculty RecruitmentThe Department of Medicine is led by an extraordinary group of faculty who are experts in their fields.
claims.claimText: Department of Medicine surfaces a Faculty Recruitment section — Tier 3 attending/faculty hiring signal.
claims.limitations: Section header only; no job listings, visa, or compensation details on this page.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 focused on residency/fellowship mentions and missed the Faculty Recruitment signal (Tier 3 attending hiring).
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Faculty Recruitment is a Tier 3 post-trainee/attending career signal.

claims.quote: The program encompasses eight (8) 2.5-hour sessions held approximately once a month on a Wednesday evening. In-person attendance is required and sessions are held at Emory's HSRB II campus.
claims.claimText: Program structure: eight 2.5-hour in-person monthly Wednesday-evening sessions at HSRB II campus.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Duration spec belongs to Tier 3 faculty entrepreneurship certificate program.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured eligibility but did not extract the discrete duration/structure sentence.

claims.quote: All interested and eligible candidates will have to complete the application by June 17th (coming soon). All applications will be reviewed by a selection committee and candidates will be notified by July 22nd.
claims.claimText: Application deadline June 17th; selection committee notifies candidates by July 22nd.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Application timeline for Tier 3 internal faculty certificate.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 did not surface the discrete deadline/notification dates.

claims.quote: Program topics will focus on stages of the commercialization process from identifying a gap in the market and generating a concept to funding a startup and identifying an exit strategy.
claims.claimText: Curriculum covers commercialization stages: market-gap identification, concept generation, startup funding, exit strategy.
claims.limitations: Faculty entrepreneurship content, not clinical training.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Curriculum scope reinforces Tier 3 post-trainee faculty service classification.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured the program purpose but not the specific curriculum scope sentence.
